entry.title: GL transactional data mass reset/reverse for 1 company code
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support,

Our customer would like to re-migrate one of their companies  for both set of books - local & group. Is there any function that you can provide to mass reset/reverse the transactional data for all postings made to this specific company code?


Best regards,
PERSON_NAME 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: GL transactional data mass reset/reverse for 1 compan...
entry.content:
No, SAP Business ByDesign does not provide a standard function to mass reset or reverse all transactional data for a specific company code.

However, individual transactions can be reversed manually

entry.title: Re: Would i able to do stay certified assessment by purch...
entry.content: Dear Margit, Thank you for your assistance. I have a follow-up question regarding the Partner Learning Hub subscription our company is planning to purchase. Once we are connected to the designated learning bucket, will we have access to self-assessment tools and resources within the platform? Thank you for your clarification.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud: Unifying Enterprise Data for Next-Generation Insights
entry.content: Good to know! Datasphere will be there!

entry.title: AO connection to HANA direct ODBC connection
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

Is there an issue with this supported solution of SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (AO) connection to HANA using direct ODBC (Type: Direct Connection) connection? AO export to excel and then if a reporting tool like Power BI is used I assume the note here is relevant 3255746 - Unpermitted usage of ODP Data Replication APIs - SAP for Me.?  

assumption:

  1. is this is not live data when the query is run to pull new data.  
  2. it is using 'The plug-in called SAP HANA EPM-MDS component (previously also known under the terms InformationAccess (InA) or MultiDimensional Services (MDS)))
  3. the way to go would be to have a solution with SAP Analytics Cloud Connection, and configuration of SAC with Live Data Connections and have AO pull real-time data through this connection. License would require to be converted from basic? to SAP Analytics Cloud for Business Intelligence (BI),

     

    • For more see SAP Note 2885389 Note 2885389 SAP Note 2294147. This would also require converting license from 'Basic SAP Analytics Cloud which is pre-requisite for AO' to 'sap analytics cloud for business intelligence, public system option'. 

We do not have BW system, and runtime DB license.

 Defining connections to SAP HANA | SAP Help Portal. 

Defining connections to SAP Analytics Cloud | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: 3537476 KRNL 753 PL 1436
entry.content:
Does SAP Kernel 753PL1436 addresses the vulnerabilities of SAP Note 3537476?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 3537476 KRNL 753 PL 1436
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, SAP Kernel 753PL1436 will already contain the correction instructions of SAP Note 3537476.

For more details, please refer to SAP Note 3549556 - FAQ for Security Note 3537476 / Error Create failed during internal communication.

 

Best regards;

entry.title: Re: Map the database table data to Purchase Order JSON format
entry.content: Did you find out how to remove the square brackets?

entry.title: Work permit alert expiration rule issue
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I was trying to create a business rule to trigger an alert notification and send an email to inform HR that an employee’s Work Permit in Singapore will expire in 30 days and 60 days.

For this purpose, I created the following rule:

However, after reviewing the workflow and the alert message, HR only receives the alert when the Work Permit expiration date is two months before. The second condition for 30 days is being skipped.
In Manage Alerts & Notifications, the 30-day alert remains pending.

I tried a different approach, and my concern is whether this approach is correct, using a date plus condition in the "IF" clause:



With this second approach, HR receives both alerts for 30 days and 60 days, and the alert creation date and alert effective date remain the same (as of today, during testing).

Could you please provide your expertise and guidance?

Thank you!

entry.title: Request for Mass Upload of Journal Entries from Excel for Multiple Companies
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We need to know if there is a way to upload journal entries in bulk via an Excel file for multiple companies. Due to the nature of our business, we manually process many journal entries through files, and we currently have to prepare a separate template for each company (we manage over companies). We would need to be able to post journal entries for several companies at once using an Excel template.

Is there any way to achieve this?

Thank you very much for your assistance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request for Mass Upload of Journal Entries from Excel...
entry.content: Thank you for your inquiry. In SAP Business ByDesign, journal entries can be uploaded in bulk via Microsoft Excel templates, but currently, the standard system requires separate templates for each company. There is no standard functionality to post journal entries for multiple companies at once using a single Excel file.    Regards

entry.title: Re: Set up Outlook Integration for Interview Scheduling in Test instance and PRD instance
entry.content:

Just wondering if you got any feedback or if you solve this escenario.

entry.title: Where can I find the results of the CALL CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY query in SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

After executing this query for consistency check:

CALL CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY ('CHECK', 'NULL', 'NULL');

Where can I find the result of the query? from where I can analyze it? does it create trace file?

In what format the output will generate for this?

Please let me know where can I find the result for this.

Thank you in Advance!

 

Best Regards,

Shruti

entry.title: MEASUREMENT POINT MAINTENANCE PLAN DUE BASED ON LAST COMPLETION
entry.content:
We have maintenance plans set up to generate a PM based on a counter reading. 

MP1 - Weekly hour meter reading for counter 1 is entered. 

MP2 - PM generated for equipment every 800 hours based on counter 1. 

At 800 hours MP2 generates a PM for the technician to service the equipment. However, based on equipment availability and scheduling the equipment has 850 hours when the service is completed. 

Is it possible to add a measurement reading to MP2 for hour meter reading once service is completed so that MP2 next service would be at 1650 hours instead of 1600?

entry.title: Re: E-Verify Reporting - find latest case status

entry.title: querying compound employee API for manager name
entry.content:
I am trying to query an employee`s manager`s name from SF compound API, i am using SAP CPI for the integration, i am trying to do this without adding an enrichment call. I was reading up the SF compound employee API and i found this in the latest document

" A common use case here is to query data of the employees' managers. Use the
associated_employee_information segment to get the managers along with the employees, instead of
querying this data separately "

Has anyone ever done this, This will reduce the number of calls needing to be made to SF Hugely, if any example can be provided for this would be great.

Thank you.

entry.title: Custom Adapter Module with Build Path External JAR
entry.content:
Hello experts,

My scenario:

Development Infrastructure
  Software Component
    Development Component
      EAR (Referenced Projects: My EJB localdevelopment)
      EJB

The custom module logic (validating the XML before it is processed) was created separately and was added as an external JAR in the EJB localdevelopment Project.

My current module class dont have compilation Errors (Syntax Errors) but Build errors when Build gets executed.

The error import classes are those from my external JAR:

As far as I have been able to find out, setting the Build Path is not enough.

Im not sure but Im think there are 2 ways to resolve this: 

- Create an External Library project:

Source: Using External Libraries for Development with NWDI 

The above approach Using Exteral Libraries I think need to be linked with the Deployment descriptors.

Deployment descriptors 

- I found another resource Referencing an External JAR File

Source: Referencing an External JAR

Questions:

Is this the only way to handle external libraries in an EJB or is there another way that is easier?

The following post make references in the application-j2ee-engine.xsd but I don't see that the person have created an External Library DC:

How to create SAP PI adapter modules in EJB 3.0 

What exactly should I do? So far, beyond referencing the EJB in the EAR at the time I create it, do I need to do anything else?

I have done the research, but I see different procedures, can someone help me decide how to achieve this?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Simplify User Administration in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi  @mfoeken 

I have read so many blogs and now I'm completely confused.

What is recommended for creating users and teams in cloud apps like SAC?

This is what I understand:

  • Teams should be created via IPS.
  • Dynamic user creation should be used (users are not provisioned through IPS).

How are users deleted then? What is the correct way to create and delete users in SAC?

Thank you very much.

 

Best regards

Thanks

Venkatesh Rampe

entry.title: Re: Excel Upload Using RAP Application
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thanks for replying please find below my modified test code using ABAP2XLSX github repository but since still in background it is calling GUI_UPLOAD system is not allowing excel data to be even uploaded to system since it is a cloud system. Could you please share any particular method that can used within ABAP2XLSX repository to capture file data on cloud system.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF lty_excel_s,
             dummy    TYPE string,
             field    TYPE string,
             fieldtyp TYPE string,
             value    TYPE string,
             desc     TYPE string,
             dummy1   TYPE string,
             field1   TYPE string,
             fildtyp1 TYPE string,
             value1   TYPE string,
             desc1    TYPE string,
             dummy2   TYPE string,
             field2   TYPE string,
             fildtyp2 TYPE string,
             value2   TYPE string,
             desc3    TYPE string,
             dummy3   TYPE string,
             field3   TYPE string,
             fildtyp3 TYPE string,
             value3   TYPE string,
             desc4    TYPE string,
             dummy4   TYPE string,
             field4   TYPE string,
             fildtyp4 TYPE string,
             value4   TYPE string,
             desc6    TYPE string,
             dummy5   TYPE string,
             field5   TYPE string,
             fildtyp5 TYPE string,
             value5   TYPE string,
             dummy6   TYPE string,
             field6   TYPE string,
             fildtyp6 TYPE string,
             value6   TYPE string,
             desc9    TYPE string,
             dummy7   TYPE string,
             field7   TYPE string,
             fildtyp7 TYPE string,
             value7   TYPE string,
             desc17   TYPE string,
             dummy8   TYPE string,
             field8   TYPE string,
             fildtyp8 TYPE string,
             value8   TYPE string,
             desc38   TYPE string,
             dummy9   TYPE string,
             field9   TYPE string,
             fildtyp9 TYPE string,
             value9   TYPE string,
             desc39   TYPE string,
           END OF lty_excel_s.

    DATA: p_upfile TYPE string VALUE 'C:\Users\HP\Downloads\Attachment.xls'.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <lt_data> TYPE STANDARD TABLE.
    DATA: lo_reader    TYPE REF TO zif_excel_reader,
          lo_excel     TYPE REF TO zcl_excel,
          lo_worksheet TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_worksheet,
          lo_error     TYPE REF TO cx_root,
          lo_alv       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table,
          lv_max_col   TYPE zexcel_cell_column,
          lv_max_row   TYPE int4.

    DATA: lt_data1 TYPE TABLE OF lty_excel_s.

    TRY.
        CREATE OBJECT lo_reader TYPE zcl_excel_reader_2007.
        lo_excel = lo_reader->load_file(  p_upfile ).

        lo_worksheet = lo_excel->get_active_worksheet(  ).
        lv_max_col = lo_worksheet->get_highest_column(  ).
        lv_max_row = lo_worksheet->get_highest_row(  ).

        lo_worksheet->get_table(
          EXPORTING
            iv_skip_bottom_empty_rows = abap_true
            iv_max_col                = lv_max_col
            iv_max_row                = lv_max_row
          IMPORTING
            et_table                  = lt_data1 ).
    ENDTRY.

 Best Regards.

entry.title: Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace – Consistent User Experience (6 of 7)
entry.content:
Continuing along our exploration of "Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace over individual visibility platforms," we turn our attention to the often overlooked aspect of: "Maintain a Consistent and Personalized User Experience."

This aspect speaks to the fact that SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace is not only powerful tool, delivering logistics visibility in the context of the shipper’s business, but it also delivers a consistent, efficient, and flexible user experience that can be tailored to an individual’s needs.

Why is this important?  Because learning curves can be steep with other external systems – they present a risk unto themselves.  Change management is a key discipline for competitiveness, as companies adapt to new needs, new risks, and new market influences. 

Asking supply chain and logistics practitioners or senior leaders to leave their core environment to maneuver in a different system, even with single sign-on, can decrease efficiency and as well as impede time-sensitive and strategic decision making.

And why is this often overlooked?  Because we often focus on what is different when looking to improve, while taking for granted the value of consistency. 

When supply chain and logistics practitioners or senior leaders can stay in their zone, where logistics visibility such as predictive ETAs can be used in the context of their core business processes, efficiency and productivity increase and latency in risk management, issue response time, and strategic decisions falls away.  

By leveraging SAP’s core design for user interface, increasingly enhanced with AI, SAP ensures that practitioners and leaders alike gain the efficiency and insights to perform at their best.  In a competitive market, the best performing companies excel at change management. 

From a change management perspective, the aim is to add capability, not complexity.

Global manufacturing companies leverage a mix of cross-functional teams and domain experts, often spread across different locations and departments, each requiring access to specific logistics information relevant to their roles and objectives.  Distributed, matrixed teams introduce risks and challenges for system administration as well as process execution. 

Managing user access and permissions across multiple platforms can:

  • Increase complexity
  • Burden administration with low-value, time-consuming tasks
  • Lead to inconsistencies and security risks

Executing core processes that require the proverbial "swivel chair” between systems, internal and external, can:

  • Decrease efficiency
  • Limit productivity
  • Increase risk and issue response latency
  • Risk production schedules
  • Jeopardize customer satisfaction

When gaining logistics visibility capabilities, SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace mitigates these hazards by providing a single platform with consistent user access and role-based permissions based on SAP’s core user interface design. This means administrators can define user roles and grant appropriate access levels with a familiar process, ensuring that each team member sees only the information they need. This not only streamlines the user experience but also enhances data security and integrity.

Furthermore, team members and stakeholders, regardless of their department or function, can gain access to shipment tracking and predictive ETAs in the context of their core process – no need to venture into other systems or external portals.  User preferences, saved views and filters, and read-edit rights, for example, are native to the SAP landscape.  

A consistent and personalized user experience is vital for ensuring that logistics visibility capabilities are effectively adopted and utilized across an organization.  By providing a consistent, efficient, and flexible user interface along with role-based access controls, SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace empowers global manufacturers and distributors to streamline user management, enhance security, and create more efficient and productive operations.

Check out this three minute video to see how SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace fits into SAP’s suite of supply chain logistics solutions.  


Next up, our last topic, reason #7 to choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trac over individual visibility platforms: Tailor Your Tracking Process. 

Don’t miss this last installation, where the best is saved for last.  See how you can literally track any process with SAP’s solution.  And catch this last post to gather a few more ways to explore more about SAP’s track and trace capability.  

Check back here for the upcoming link or subscribe to SAP Business Network for Logistics on SAP Community.

entry.title: How is propagated demand mean calculated in the upstream node?
entry.content:
Hello
I have configured and run the MEIO operator and I am struggling understanding how the SAP Integrated Business Planning for inventory has calculated the Propagated Demand Mean for the upstream node. The transportation lead time is set to 0 and PBR is set to 4

Can someone help me understand how the 5.076,6 is derived?

entry.title: How to create graduated totals for P&L in the Financial Statement Version
entry.content:
Dear community,

I am trying to create graduated totals for some P&L items in the FSV using transaction OB58, but I don’t know how to use the functionality correctly.

In the attached screenshot, I want to create a subtotal for Gross Income = Revenue - COGS.

Could you advise me on how to build graduated totals in this case so that I can properly display the subtotals?

Best regards,
Stefan

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed
entry.content:
🎉 Thrilled to be a Devtoberfest winner! The challenges, late-night coding, and dedication paid off. Huge thanks to all participants and the SAP team for an incredible experience!

Excited to attend SAP TechEd in Berlin—can’t wait to connect, share ideas, and dive into the latest SAP innovations. See you at TechEd 2025! 🚀💡

 

Thanks,

Vishalakshmi.

entry.title: Unable to access BAS
entry.content:
Hello,

I am unable to access my BAS trial account. I am receiving the following error: "You do not have the necessary roles to access SAP Business Application Studio."

I was able to access the BAS portal, but suddenly, I am encountering the error mentioned above.

I have attached a screenshot showing the roles assigned to my account.

entry.title: Function module TMS_MGR_IMPORT_TR_REQUEST in S4
entry.content:
We have a custom workflow process for approving/moving transports to PRD.
Once the WF is approved, a custom program ultimately calls FM TMS_MGR_IMPORT_TR_REQUEST to execute the transport(s).
This has been working fine in ECC for years however, it does not work in our new S4 environment.
The first try failed with the screen shot message below.

We fixed that with these steps:
1. Turn off the component check for the system.
2. Set set the parameter SP_TRANS_SYNC=OFF in the system details in STMS.
3. Once that is set you will not have tp checking the component level of every transport request in queue and everything will work much faster. Also, this error will be gone since no checks will be performed against TMS queue entries.

Now, the FM returns a zero return code, but the transport is not moved.
Any ideas?

Thanks
Leo

Hi,

I am trying to do an enhancement which is in exit MOVE_TO_VBEP. I've added 3 Custom field

SCREEN-NAME 'field'

We have in a Migration Project from SAP ECC to S4 HANA.

In ECC system, Controlling areas are not assigned to Operating Concern.

We want to know if in S4 HANA is mandatory this assigment.  If there is a sap note or another documentation, could you share it?

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

José Luis

entry.title: Stock that is still stuck in the system after it has been successfully scrapped from EWM
entry.content: Hello, we performed a scrapping movement using an outbound delivery and posted it in EWM.  It came back to SAP successfully and shows posted as well.  However, the stock lingers in MMBE.  Any ideas how to clear this?

entry.title: Re: Inquiry About Recovering Deleted Root Parent
entry.content:
Hi Franco,

Looking at the two images in your question, I suspect that you have already restored the root group folder but it is now appearing in the "Unclassified" folder.  If the image in Producer is up to date, I would do the following:

1. Click on the root group folder in Manager and click the Start Editing button.  Having editing control in Manager will allow relationships to be written, which may result in the root group folder moving out of the Unclassified folder
2. If the root group folder is still sitting in the Unclassified folder, click on it.  Once it is highlighted, drag it out of the unclassified folder and place it in position as a child of the overall Workspace object
3. Move any other folders that are out of place into the structure so that the structure is correct in Manager.  You may have to get editing control of other folders to be able to move folders to new parent objects
4. Once the content structure is correct in Manager, click on the root group folder.  Click the down arrow beside the More link and select Finish Editing All Objects.  You should no longer have editing control in Manager
5. Open Producer, right click the root group folder and choose Server Bulk Actions > Update All Objects from Server
6. If the content structure, after loading, is still not correct in Producer, click on an object that has issues with one or more child objects and start editing the parent object.  Once you have editing control of an object in Producer, the relationships to child objects can be written, if necessary
7. Once the structure now looks correct in Producer, right click the root group folder and select Server Bulk Actions > Finish Editing All Objects.  You should never keep editing control of objects unless you are currently working on them.

Hope that helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: BW4HANA Open ODS view - master data
entry.content:
Open ODS Views do not automatically apply key-date-based filtering like standard BW InfoObjects, requiring explicit filtering in queries. Moving valid period fields to attributes makes them visible since they are no longer interpreted as validity periods. Replacing time-stamps with CALDAY may enhance filtering efficiency. If Open ODS Views prove too restrictive, consider using an ADSO or a Composite Provider as an alternative.

 

Thanks,

Vishala.

entry.title: Can business rules use background check data as criteria?
entry.content:
Background check data displays on the candidate's job application, in the Background Check Status section. I'd like to access this data (the background check's status) within the criteria (If statement) of a business rule. Unfortunately, I don't see that data as available when creating a business rule.

Is this possible? If so, what must happen to expose the background check data to business rules?

Thank you in advance for your consideration and response.

entry.title: Export Manual Test Plans/Cases from one SAP Cloud ALM and Import into another
entry.content:
Hi there,

Is it possible to export Manual Test Plans/Cases from one SAP Cloud ALM and Import into another?

I can see some exports are available as simple excel lists but there does not seem to be an import for manual test cases, there is only an import for automated test cases.

I have read:

  • Excel Upload of Test Case into SAP Cloud ALM - SAP Community
  • How to import Test Scripts from the SAP Best Pract... - SAP Community
  • 3217691 - SAP Cloud ALM Manual Test Case Content for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud and SAP S/4HANA (private cloud and on-premise)

But these are more about creating the test case manually and importing all the best practice steps and then manually selecting/deselecting the steps.

In our case all this work has been done in one SAP Cloud ALM tenant, and we simply want to mass download and upload to a different tenant, if possible.

Any advice is appreciated, thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Export Manual Test Plans/Cases from one SAP Cloud ALM...
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM currently only offers the option to export manual Test Cases in an excel files, so that the excel file can be re-uploaded for the purpose of editing the existing Test Cases. As per the Product documentation, it is not currently possible to create Test Cases via the excel upload. So this functionality cannot be used to perform a transfer of Test Cases from one SAP Cloud ALM tenant to another.

A possible workaround exists. But it requires a large amount of manual effort. 

  1. Export the Test Cases as an excel file from the "source" SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  2. Count the number of Test Cases that need to be re-created in the "target" tenant.
  3. Create that amount of Test Cases in the target tenant, with very basic placeholder data (you can copy + paste the same data to save time).
  4. Export the excel file of these "placeholder" Test Cases from the "target" tenant.
  5. Copy the real data from the "source" tenant excel file, then paste it into the "target" tenant excel file.
    1. Ensure that no data generated by the "target" SAP Cloud ALM tenant is overwritten (e.g. Test Case ID numbers).
  6. Upload the edited "target" excel file in the "Target" SAP Cloud ALM tenant. 
  7. The "placeholder" Test Cases should now be updated to reflect the same data that was exported from the "source" tenant. 

If this workaround is not acceptable, please create a request using the SAP Customer Influence campaign related to SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation.

entry.title: Re: Prompted for username and password when running Fiori...
entry.content: Thanks for pointing me in this direction. I restarted, followed the SAP help guides you suggested. This time it prompted me for access to mac keychain store, which I allowed and it worked. I am pretty sure I followed this process before, but perhaps I messed up somewhere along the way.

entry.title: Some require fields are not available in Loading Instruction form template “EWM_LOADING_LIST”
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

As per business requirement, Below fields are not available in the Loading Instruction form template “EWM_LOADING_LIST” in S4 public cloud. 

Loading references: Delivery/Freight order/Sales order/Purchase order

Departure point / loading location

Destination

Loading- and delivery date

Product/description/batch/quantity/packaging (Bulk/Bigbag)

Carrier


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Some require fields are not available in Loading Inst...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

You can extend the Adobe output forms of loading instructions according to your business needs.

Key users can extend the Adobe output forms in the Adobe LiveCycle Designer with standard SAP fields available in the data connection of the form.

For further information please check:
SAP Help Portal - Extensibility for Adobe Output Forms of Outbound Delivery Orders
SAP Community - Manufacturing and Supply Chain in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2008
Please also check:
SAP Influence Request: EWM_LOADING_LIST: form extensibility (warehouse order, warehouse task, destination bin)
SAP Help Portal - Print Form for Loading List
Best regards,
SAP Support.

entry.title: Display values from one object in separate columns
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have created a WebI report for a standard employee roster in a vertical table consisting of name, status, worksite, phone, email, address, etc. The problem I’m having is the phone object has different value types (cell, home, work, etc) so I’m getting multiple rows with the same data except for the different phone number types.

I need the phone values separated into different columns. I’ve searched previous posts and some have recommended using Break or a variable or crosstab report. 

How can I easily display the values into separate columns?

Also, I noticed when selecting one value type like ‘cell’ I end up with only those rows which contain a cell number and all other employee rows are not displayed. The phone object list of values doesn’t include ‘blank’ or ‘null’ so how can I get all rows displayed with a specific value type like ‘cell’ AND any blanks? 

Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Cloud Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) - how to...
entry.content:
Hi umasaral,

I've had a look at your 4 options.

1. I can't find CDS view I_JournalEntryItemText in CDS Views | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub. I'm not sure if I miss anywhere.

2. Read_Text Function Module is not released for ABAP Cloud (Solved: Read_text( header _text ) value in Sap Abap on Clo... - SAP Community)

3. I'm not sure extending standard views will help since I want to retrieve the text entered in FB70, not creating another field.

4. API: Journal Entry - Read (A2X) doesn't have any relevant text fields.

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: Re: HANA Query to track how many sales documents each use...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can refer this for the same

https://forum.sapb1.vn/community/systemtools/cau-truy-van-tong-hop-so-luong-chung-tu-duoc-tao-theo-tung-nguoi-dung/#post-638

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: SAP C4C Technical Capabilities Vs SAP CRM On Premise Technical Capabilities
entry.content:
Hello All,

Wanted to know why C4C technologies cannot support heavy enhancements as compared to SAP CRM On Premise Solutions, I know for the fact that the server in on premise lies with the customer, and in Cloud it is hosted with SAP. I checked some blogs on the forum but did not get a proper resolution hence thought of asking this

1) Custom Screens can be built in both systems

2) Custom Tables can be built in both systems

3) Through Odata the function modules are present in C4C systems which can be exposed to other third party systems and can be interfaced like SAP CRM On Premise systems.

4) Custom Enhancements can be done in both systems

Hence technically can C4C support heavy custom enhancements which are deployed in SAP CRM On Premise Systems? if no then can you please let me know which enhancements are not supported and why? If examples could be given in this regard would be great.

Kind Regards

Atul

entry.title: パートナーデモ環境でJouleを有効化してみる
entry.content:
はじめに

とうとうJouleのTDDライセンスが登場しました！

ということで、いそいそと有効化しているのですが、うまくいかないので、これまでに出会った課題を共有しつつ、自分が困っているとこまで誰かがたどり着いて解決してくれたらうれしいな、という動機でブログを書いています。よろしくお願いいたします。

基本的にはこちらのMissionに従って設定しています。
https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/missiondetail/4452/4738/

ヘルプも参照しています。
https://help.sap.com/docs/JOULE/6189c8655c484916bb8eb767126a653a/48e8f655470048c29555272578fbc2ce.html?mt=ja-JP&locale=ja-JP

 

 

BTPのシステムランドスケープにS/4HANA Cloudをマニュアルで追加する際のトークン生成

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/mymissiondetail/143683/cardName/Register%20SAP%20S%2F4HANA%20Cloud%20Public%20Edition%20in%20BTP%20Global%20Account/?tab=projectboard

上記Missionを始めると最初に飛ばされる
Establish a Unified Joule Instanceの方のMissionの、
Register SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition in BTP Global Account
というBoardのステップで、トークンを生成する手順があります。
日本語のUIだと「登録トークンを生成できませんでした」のエラーになりました。
こちらは、英語表示に切り替えると、問題なく生成できました。

ちなみに、このあたりをヘルプで確認していると、
自動追加されたS/4HANA Cloud ランドスケープがあればマニュアル追加は不要なのかな？
という気がしてきますが、マニュアル追加なしでJouleのブースターを進めると
「S4HCシステムが見つかりません」
とエラーになるので、自動作成されたS4HCが見えていても、マニュアル生成は必要とわかりました。

 

Jouleのブースターで、Jouleサブスクリプションの有効化が失敗する

Missionの手順に従って、Jouleブースターを実施したところ、途中で失敗してしまいました。
ヘルプを確認してみたら、下記設定のうち、Email_verified の設定が足りなかったので追加し、再実行したところ、成功しました。（関係があるのか正直わかりませんが…）
https://help.sap.com/docs/JOULE/6189c8655c484916bb8eb767126a653a/bf89decc2bbf4dd88725248724f4610a.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION

 

WorkZoneとS4HCのロールの同期が失敗する

Missionに記載はない（と思う）のですが、
こちらのBlogの 3.1 Create Source and Target Systems に記載があるとおり、
Workzone側でリフレッシュをして、ビジネスロールなどのコンテンツの同期を同期する手順があります。
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/joule-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-setup-guide/ba-p/13965333
実施してみたところ、一つのビジネスロールに3000件以上のアプリが割り当たっていることが原因で、同期がエラーとなりました。

ALL権限的なビジネスロールを削除し、エラーを回避することで、ロールの同期は成功しました。

 

IPSのジョブは成功するが、WorkZone側のユーザにロールが割り当たらない（未解決）

今ココです。

複製のジョブは成功するのですが、WorkZoneで結果を確認した際に、ロールが割り当たらないです。先ほどのブログの画像と比較すると、groupのコピーが実施されていないように見えます。

ブログの手順でターゲットシステムを作り直して試したのですが、結果は変わらずでした。
設定しくじってエラーになった際、エラーファイルの中ではgroup（ビジネスロールにあたるもの）も渡そうとしているようなので、そんなに設定は悪くないはず、なのですが、これ以上試すことが見つからない状況です。

 

おわりに

どなたか原因わかる有識者の方がいたら情報よろしくお願いしますー！

ケースにも上げてはいるので、もしそちらで進展あったらこちらもUpdateしようと思います

entry.title: COPA overhead allocation issue
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are currently amid SIT, testing the Manage Allocation app for Overhead allocation. At this point, the sender includes only two fields: "Account Number" and "Cost Center".

The question is, instead of creating cost center groups, can we use the "Profit Center" in the "Sender" Tab?

I would appreciate your guidance on what the best solution for this issue would be.

As per business requirement SAP doesn't have standard functionality to enable the PC at Sender tab, which makes the COPA cycles design on hold, which intends to impact Revenue reporting of business for the month end closure.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: COPA overhead allocation issue
entry.content:
It's possible to use profit centers as 'Senders' when using allocation cycles,
see detailed information in Allocation Contexts.

Actually, the authorization is seperately controlled by different business catalogs.

You can check the required business catalogs in Manage Allocations

IMPLEMENTATION INFORMATION->Configuration->Business Catalog(s):

SAP_FIN_BC_OH_MD_PCA_PC - Profit Center Accounting - Profit Center Master Data 
SAP_FIN_BC_OH_MD_PED_PC - Overhead Cost Accounting - Period End Master Data 
SAP_FIN_BC_SA_MDT_PC - Sales Accounting - Master Data 

Above 3 catalogs grant the authorization to profit center/cost center/profitability segment.
If you want to use profit center allocation, kindly make sure the required catalog SAP_FIN_BC_OH_MD_PCA_PC is assigned to a business role and that role is assigned to your user, you can check it via APP 'Maintain Business roles' and 'Maintain Business Users'.

Thanks & Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Behavior of Smart Multi Input paste value from excel
entry.content:
Dear SAPUI5 expert, 

I recalled we could paste value from excel into Smart Multi Input with value help. However recently I checked this functionality was not supported for Smart Multi Input with Value Help. 

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.ui.comp.smartmultiinput.SmartMultiInput/sample/sap.ui.comp.sample.smartmultiinput.withoutBinding/code

Sample Data: 

Copy below values and paste in Category with Value Help from Annotations, only last value was pasted.

CAT1
CAT2
CAT3

Copy below values and paste in Category Product Value, all values was pasted. 

700001
700002
700003

Questions: Why Smart Multi Input with value help does not support paste multiple values from excel?

Regards,

Ben

SAPUI5

entry.title: 回复： How to configure decimal places in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Fujita,

You cannot edit a pre-delivered unit. Instead, you can create your own, for example ZKG, to replace the standard one.

Best Regards,
Matt

Matt

Thank you in advance.

Erick

entry.title: In Public Cloud, can I generate Defect automatically for the Inspected Unit that was rejected?
entry.content:
We cannot use Quantity Based Inspection Points in Public Cloud (Feb 2025). We thus create a 100% Inspection and SAP allow us to record a result for each Unit.
I want to automatically generate a Defect when a Unit is Rejected. The problem is that SAP creates the Defect when the average of the Characteristic is outside specification (Rejected).
Any idea what I can do to generate a Defect per rejected Unit?
Using MIC with 92 Major characteristic, Defect active, Defect Coding added, in Routing (03 Insp Lot) with Sampling Procedure 100% Inspection. Defect Class = 92 Major defect.

I would like a Defect to be created for Unit 3. If the average result for Char 20 is outside specifications, it creates a Defect.

Thanx in advance
Corne

entry.title: Re: Restricting Enterprise Search - S_ESH_CONN
entry.content: Thanks Ander. As long as it does not affect any fiori apps then it should be fine for deactivation. Thank you for your inputs on this.

entry.title: Frequent Error Messages during Asset Accounting data migration to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Frequent Error Messages during Asset Accounting data migration to S/4HANA

During the conversion of an ERP solution to SAP S/4HANA, several frequent errors may occur in Asset Accounting (FI-AA) data migration. Below is a summary of the most common errors and their resolutions:

Error FINS_RECON761:

  • Possible Causes:
    • If the error comes up in phase R25 and the difference is very small for the field NAFAP in tables FAAV_ANLC_ORI and FAAV_ANLC, it is due to rounding and can be ignored.
    • Very often, the error is closely related to error message FINS_RECON795 in phase R21, when there is a mismatch between line Items ANEP/ ANEA and Totals ANLC for certain assets. In this case, the inconsistency existed in the source ERP, already and can be due to different reasons (wrong handling, software bugs etc.)
  • Recommendation:
  1. Use program FINS_MIG_AA_CHECK_RC45 for detailed FI-AA error checks.
    1. Compare records in the source ERP system between ANLC and ANEP/ANEA tables to identify if there are any inconsistencies or not.
    2. If no inconsistencies are found in 1 and If error is in phase R25 : check the NAFAP field to see if there are small differences for tables FAAV_ANLC_ORI and FAAV_ANLC. If small differences are found, this error can be accepted.  As these differences are due to rounding done by the system when using Depreciation Methods with Base Value equal to Acquisition or Replacement, because of a more precise data type used for the calculation in S/4 HANA. This is explained in SAP KBA 2328351 - FINS_RECON 761 for small NAFAP differences.
    3. If the error occurs in Phase R25 and you are using a leasing solution: Check SAP KBA 3442610 - Error FINS_RECON761 occurred in step R25 during data migration to S/4HANA - SAP for Me for leasing solutions.
    4. If error is in phase 24: Refer to SAP Notes 2514510 - Data Migration: FINS_RECON 761 in step R24 - SAP for Me, 2532471 - No updates in migration process step DLT_AA or during Balancy Carry Forward - SAP for Me, 2526882 - FINS_RECON 761 in step R24 for fiscal years with archived depreciation (ANLP) - SAP for Me, 2767354 - Error message FINS_RECON 761 ("Mismatched balance for ANLC") in migration step R24 - SAP for Me.
    5. If old fiscal years are affected, archiving could be considered as an option, since re-opening of old fiscal years is most of the times no option for customer.
    6. If unresolved, create a SAP incident to contact SAP (component FIN-MIG-AA).
    7. For more information, refer to SAP Note 2714344 - Financial data migration to SAP S/4HANA: Most frequent Error Messages – Information and Recommendations - SAP for Me

 

Errors FINS_RECON741, 743, 744, 771, 772

Possible Causes:

    • Data not completely migrated in phase MUJ because of e.g.: FI-AA customizing in SAP S/4HANA is not complete (e.g. missing account determinations) or Program error etc.
    • Very often there are other error messages for the same assets in earlier phases (e.g. FINS_RECON793 in phase R21) because the data is inconsistent in the source system
    • Error message can happen in context of migration of group assets before the SAP S/4HANA Conversion. Refer to SAP Note 2508546. Errors are displayed for identical assets. The affected assets are assigned to a group asset in the reported area or are themselves group assets.
  • Recommendation:
    1. Use program FINS_MIG_AA_CHECK_RC45 for detailed FI-AA error checks
    2. In case of group assets, check the values for assets (group and individual assets ) with errors and compare them with the values in ECC system.  If amounts are correct and the only difference is in LNRAN for individual assets, refer to note 2508546 - Error messages in context of migration of group assets - SAP for Me
    3. If the errors are due to inconsistency between group assets and individual assets in other scenarios, analyze and check further and resolve these inconsistencies before migration.
    4. As a remark, group assets are available in S/4HANA after migration but after the end of 2025, group assets functionality will no longer be supported by SAP. Further information can be found in 3014869 - S4TWL - Group Assets - SAP for Me
    5. Check SAP Notes 2514510 and 2577469 are implemented
    6. Check SAP Note 2785894 is implemented before the MUJ Phase execution
    7. If the error message is for old fiscal years, consider archiving that old data before conversion.
    8. If the issue persists, create SAP incident to contact SAP (component FIN-MIG-AA).
  1. For more information, refer to SAP Note 2714344 - Financial data migration to SAP S/4HANA: Most frequent Error Messages – Information and Recommendations - SAP for Me

Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA Customer Care and RIG.

entry.title: Re: Monitor/Manage applications in S4 HANA disappear intermittently
entry.content: Hi George, Yes that is correct. Mainly using edge for browser. And noticed this on these applications - Monitor Purchase Order Items, Manage Purchase Contracts, Monitor Purchase Contract Item. But can't replicate it as it happens every once in a while.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi All,

Greatest Thanks to you all,

S/4 Hana Studio Connect & Login both are working fine.

Thanks again for your support and assistance.

All issues of mine are closed for now.

Thanks & Regards

Kushal Sambhunath Banerjee

entry.title: Custom Business Object: OData Service Not Generated After Enabling Back End Service
entry.content:
Issue:

I have created a Custom Business Object (YY1_TABLE_MM_001) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) and want to expose it as an OData service for API consumption. However, after enabling the necessary settings and publishing the object, the service is not being generated.

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Open the Custom Business Objects app.
  2. Create or open the object YY1_TABLE_MM_001.
  3. Enable the following options:
    • ✅ "Back End Service"
    • ✅ "Can Be Associated with UI and Reports"
  4. Click Publish to activate the changes.
  5. Check for the generated OData service name under "Service Generation" – no service appears.
  6. Attempt to call the API endpoint:
    ruby
    CopyEdit
    https://my401583-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_TABLE_MM_001_CDS
    but receive an error stating that the HTTP method is not allowed.

Expected Behavior:

  • After enabling "Back End Service", publishing the object should generate an OData service.
  • The OData service name should be visible in the Custom Business Object settings.
  • The API should allow POST requests to create new entries.

Questions:

  1. Is there an additional step required to generate the OData service?
  2. Are there any restrictions preventing the service from being created?
  3. How can I verify whether the service is correctly generated and accessible?

entry.title: converting SCMON data to an aggregated data manually
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

 

We are starting a S/4 Hana conversion project. I enabled SCMON in production system on October in 2024 and downloaded SCMON data each week since system deletes data older than a week. I didn't know we need to aggregate data in order to add aggregated data in Custom Code Migration app in SAP Fiori App. 

 

Is it possible to upload SCMON data from the excel file to aggregated data tables? If yes can you please direct us for doing it?

 

Thanks and kind regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: converting SCMON data to an aggregated data manually
entry.content:
Dear *,

 

From SV-SMG-CCM (Customer Code Management) perspective, generally, the SCMON data can be aggregated automatically by CCM, you can configure it via SOLMAN__SETUP -> Custome Code Management -> Step 3 Set Up Custom Code Management -> Select a system and click the "System-Specific Settings" from the "Settings" drop-down box -> then you can activate the aggregation (Day/Week/Month/Year) according to your preference.

 

If you want to aggregate it manually, could you please refer to if this blog can be useful?

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/aggregate-usage-data-in-your-production-system-with-susg-transaction/ba-p/13401524

If further help is required, you can contact BC-DWB-TOO-RTA.

 

Best regards,

Leo

SAP Support

entry.title: Guidelines when creating CAP Application?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

Is there any guidelines for developers when creating CAP application?

For example, do's and don'ts for both backend and frontend point of views?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: 入库交货单 80132051，错误提示： 未关闭检验，无法开票。
entry.content:
Dear Expert：

        参考STO高级退货单创建入库交货单，已完成入库，但不能开票。错误提示：未关闭检验，无法开票。入库到冻结库存后转出到非限制库存，此笔库存未激活检验批，为何错误提示未关闭检验？而且我在检查过程中凭证没有发现异常，请教下专家们如何解决，谢谢！

entry.title: Is this a bug in the UI5 Element sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton ?
entry.content:
i am using the sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton and when the user is pressing the button the barcodescanner will open as it is supposed to be. if the user press the back button of the browser / the phone the view navigates to the view before. in the browser this is ok but on the phone the user feels it would be normal to close the barcodescanner with the backbutton of the phone and  it should stay on the view where the button is. But even worse: when i navigate again to the view with the button and press it, the barcodescanner is not opening anymore and this error apperas in the console:
BarcodeScanner.scan: Barcode scanning is already in progress. -

i tried several workarounds but nothing is working. i tried to deactivate the backbutton while the barcodescanner is open, but thats not working in modern browsers anymore. My best attempt was to close the barcodescanner before leaving the view, so it could at least open again, when trying again, but i could not successfully close it. i tried with document.getElementsByClassName('closeButton')[0].click() but it was not working.

any idea?

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Adjusted Transport Supply is not getting fulf...
entry.content: Hi,
